title: Ash US Navy Ships
description: Massive U.S. Navy ships rule the seas!
body:
[![AshCraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a75887d69106ed9eb2dd595176121f279523f184_0.webp)](https://www.ashcraft.cz/)

The AshUSNavyShips Datapack brings the strength and scale of the U.S. Navy to your Minecraft oceans. Massive warships and naval vessels now patrol your seas, adding epic military detail to your world.

⚓ Features:

✔ Randomly Generated U.S. Navy Ships – Military vessels spawn across ocean biomes.
✔ Static Structures – Ships are not moving but serve as epic, high-detail landmarks.

🌊 Spawn Mechanics:

Ships spawn randomly in ocean biomes as part of natural world generation. The datapack works flawlessly in both singleplayer and multiplayer environments.

⚙️ How to Install:

Open your Minecraft world folder (.minecraft/saves/Your_World_Name).
Place the datapack file into the datapacks folder.
Launch Minecraft and enter your world.
Use /reload in-game to activate the datapack.

That’s it! Now explore the vast oceans and discover mighty U.S. Navy ships dominating the seas. More vessels are coming soon! ⚓🚢🌊

💬 Have a ship in mind? Join my [Discord](https://discord.ashcraft.cz/) and request it!
